author: Dr15Jones
body:
#### PR description:

- all non-concurrent finders were already removed from CMSSW
- also got rid of forceEventSetupCacheClearOnNewRun option as it was using the same infrastructure but wasn't actually used itself.

#### PR validation:

All framework tests pass.

resolves https://github.com/cms-sw/framework-team/issues/2311
title: Remove support for non-concurrent EventSetupRecordIntervalFinders
